normal.label: Normal flow
normal.description: Baseline pre-kickoff conditions across the concourse.

gate-b-surge.label: Gate B surge
gate-b-surge.description: Heavy inbound crowd concentrated at Gate B ahead of kickoff.

halftime-rush.description: Concourse-wide surge as fans move to concessions and restrooms at half-time.
